title: Find My Device - Sending Tone - X button
scenario: Find My Device X button does not stop tone and return to map screen after replaying tone in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 2. Navigate to Home → Device Settings → [Device Name]
4. Tap the Play button to play a tone
5. Tap 'OK, Got It' to dismiss the prompt
6. Tap the Play button again to replay the tone
7. While the tone is playing, tap the 'X' button
expected: The tone stops playing and the user is returned to the Find My Device map screen.
